response.justification: Despite a strong general software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable professional C++ experience on Windows and has no evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise — both mandatory requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong DevOps and CI/CD practices demonstrated through infrastructure setup and tooling
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and contribute to complex systems
concerns: No visible professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
No mention of SQL Server, Oracle, or financial domain exposure in work history
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — not aligned with core C++/capital markets focus
